title: Snowed Under
writer: F. Hugh Herbert, Brown Holmes, Lawrence Saunders
actors: George Brent, Genevieve Tobin, Glenda Farrell
plot: Alan Tanner's new play opens in a week, but Tanner just can't finish the third act. He's retreated to a snowbound cottage to work, but blonde neighbor Pat Quinn wants to play. Producer Arthur Layton sends Alice, Alan's first wife,...
